chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-296 of 2022 CP No.D-297 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on Misc. No.13664/2024 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 07.08.2025 Mr. Masroor Ahmed, advocate for KW&SB Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- These are old petitions of 2022 and were lastly taken up on 02.03.2023. Despite the lapse of over 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue these petitions. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions, which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
